# Reproducer derived from https://github.com/pytest-dev/pytest-cov/issues/693
# repo: pytest-dev/pytest-cov
# title: coverage collection fails when using pytest-xdist and pytest 8.4.0

# Last frames in traceback:
#    /installdir/pytest_cov/engine.py line 57 in ensure_topdir_wrapper
#    /installdir/pytest_cov/engine.py line 469 in finish
#    /installdir/coverage/control.py line 812 in save
#    /installdir/coverage/control.py line 893 in get_data
#    /installdir/coverage/control.py line 915 in _post_save_work
#    /installdir/coverage/control.py line 460 in _warn

# Minimal repro (conceptual):

def repro():
    # Conditions described in the issue:
    # # Summary
    # pytest-xdist and pytest-cov plugins cause an internal error when used together but only on pytest version 8.4.0
    # ## Expected vs actual result
    # Expected pytest-xdist+pytest-cov to succeed.
    # See the following chart for the actual results:
    # | ⬇ pytest ♦ plugins ➡ | pytest-xdist+pytest-cov | pytest-cov | pytest-xdist |
    raise CoverageWarning('reproduce: see https://github.com/pytest-dev/pytest-cov/issues/693')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    repro()
